expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: review loop does not silently drop evidence-backed nodes
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly frames the focus and ties it to Phase 5a mechanisms: "Focus: Review loop does not silently drop evidence-backed nodes" and states "These contract requirements are the mechanism that prevents 'review loop silently drops evidence-backed nodes'." It further notes mandatory "## Coverage Preservation Audit" and "coverage-preservation validators" as explicit safeguards.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5a
expectations.evidence: result.md is organized around Phase 5a and its gates: "Primary phase: Phase 5a" and "What Phase 5a must do to satisfy this benchmark" including required artifacts and validators (e.g., "validate_phase5a_acceptance_gate"). execution_notes.md similarly lists "What was checked (Phase 5a alignment)".
